CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-09-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Mary Trans Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide The Identity And Location Of Non-Expert Witnesses And Order Plaintiff To Appear For An Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Maria Nozzolino, of Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane, Tel. 415.981.5411, for defendants;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT MARY TRAN's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide The Identity And Location Of Non-Expert Witnesses And Order Plaintiff To Appear For An Independent Medical Examination is GRANTED. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Defendant Mary Tran'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide The Identity And Location Of Non-Expert Witnesses And Order Plaintiff To Appear For An Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Ruling: Defendant Mary Tran's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide The Identity And Location Of Non-Expert Witnesses And Order Plaintiff To Appear For An Independent Medical Examination is continued to August 9, 2017, on the Court's own motion. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
